zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Erskine於大約1375年出生在英國蘇格蘭費伏時，她的父親Sir Alan Erskine of Inchmartin51歲，母親Isabel Inchmartin36歲。她去世於1427年在蘇格蘭費伏維梅斯享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Erskine于大约1375年出生在英国苏格兰費伏时，她的父亲Sir Alan Erskine of Inchmartin51岁，母亲Isabel Inchmartin36岁。她去世于1427年在苏格兰費伏維梅斯享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: Erskine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the barony of Erskine in Renfrewshire, first recorded in 1226 in the form Erskyn.
History: A family of this name have held a number of Scottish titles, including the earldoms of Mar, Buchan, Kellie, and Rosslyn.

variants.name: Erskin
meanings: Scottish (central Scotland and Fife): variant of   Erskine  . This form of the surname is now more common in the US.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Erskine was born about 1375, in Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Alan Erskine of Inchmartin, was 51 and her mother, Isabel Inchmartin, was 36. She died in 1427, in Wemyss, Fife, Scotland, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Erskine est née environ 1375, à Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Alan Erskine of Inchmartin, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Isabel Inchmartin, avait 36 ans. Elle est décédée en 1427, à Wemyss, Fife, Écosse, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Erskine um 1375 in Fife, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Alan Erskine of Inchmartin 51 und ihre Mutter Isabel Inchmartin 36. Sie starb 1427 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Wemyss, Fife, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Erskine è nata il circa 1375 nel Fife, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Alan Erskine of Inchmartin, aveva 51 anni e sua madre, Isabel Inchmartin, aveva 36 anni. Morì nel 1427, nel Wemyss, Fife, Scotland, all'età di 53 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Erskine(이)가 대략 1375년 영국 스코틀랜드 피프에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Alan Erskine of Inchmartin(은)는 51세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel Inchmartin(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1427년 스컷랜드 피프 베미스에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Erskine родилась около 1375 г. в местности фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Alan Erskine of Inchmartin было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Isabel Inchmartin, 36. Она умерла в 1427 г. в местности вемисс, фиф, Шотландия в возрасте 53 лет.
